rationale: The cited 2002 paper studies when TV ad media weight increases sales as a function of ad executional/affective content and viewer feelings, and the citing 2021 paper centers on informational vs. emotional TV ad content effects on sales (and search). The notes indicate the citing study positions itself against prior advertising-content work, so this DOI-matched citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism or empirical antecedent rather than a mere background mention.
